overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded Medjay character walking through a moonlit desert canyon that opens onto the Nile river. The sequence features cinematic game engine graphics with cool blue moonlight illuminating the rocky terrain and ancient Egyptian boat visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon between high rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon path, hooded figure with bow and sword visible on back

tall sandstone cliff face forming the right wall of the canyon
bright full moon illuminating the night sky with visible clouds

silhouetted mountains visible at the canyon's end

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow desert canyon at night, flanked by high rocky cliffs on both sides. The bright moon casts cool blue light across the sandy path as the character moves steadily forward toward the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert riverbank path along the Nile

events.description: canyon opens to reveal the Nile river and an ancient Egyptian sailing vessel moored near the shore

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward the waterfront, approaching the ancient boat docked by the shore

notable_agents.action: camel walking past the character on the left side of the path, moving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: calm blue water of the Nile river reflecting moonlight
large wooden sailing vessel with mast and sail moored near the riverbank
scattered palm trees lining the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens up to reveal the Nile river on the right, with an ancient Egyptian boat visible in the distance. The character continues walking along the sandy riverbank path as a camel passes by on the left, approaching the moored vessel with palm trees now visible along the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, moonlit canyon that gradually opens onto the expansive banks of the Nile river. It begins with the character walking steadily along a sandy path, flanked by high rocky cliffs illuminated by a cool blue moonlight. As the character moves forward toward distant mountains, the restrictive canyon walls give way to a wide river landscape on the right. The scene then expands to reveal an ancient Egyptian boat moored in the distance and palm trees lining the shore, while a camel passes by on the left. Finally, the camera continues along the riverbank path, drawing closer to the vessel under the clear night sky.
